arts.ttl: Aston Villa v Newcastle United: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 5.30pm BST kick-off Live scoreboard | League tables | And you can email Scott Villa make four changes to their starting line-up in the wake of their brave but ultimately futile 3-2 victory over Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League on Tuesday evening. Ian Maatsen, who nearly saved the day with a volley blocked on the line deep in injury time, is rewarded for his efforts with a start, along with Tyrone Mings, Marco Asensio and Ollie Watkins. Lucas Digne, Marcus Rashford and Amadou Onana drop to the bench, while Pau Torres misses out altogether. Newcastle meanwhile are in If It Ain’t Broke mode. They thumped Crystal Palace 5-0 in the Premier League on Wednesday, so name exactly the same starting XI. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa, Newcastle United team news confirmed: Does Unai Emery rotate for crunch Premier League fixture?
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Newcastle United announce their first XIs for Saturday's Premier League fixture in the West Midlands.

arts.ttl: Which Juventus players could be offered to Newcastle to lower Tonali price
arts.sum: Tuttosport newspaper reports Juventus could include Dusan Vlahovic or Douglas Luiz in a player-plus-cash swap...

arts.ttl: Antonio Conte gives 'approval' to summer Aston Villa transfer after PSG deal

arts.ttl: Aston Villa v Newcastle LIVE: Battle for Champions League spots heats up at Villa Park
arts.sum: Newcastle hold onto third place but Aston Villa will look to cut the gap

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Newcastle TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time
arts.sum: Newcastle United's push to secure Champions League qualification continues this weekend as they travel to the Midlands for a showdown with Aston Villa. Thanks to Sky Sports covering Villa vs Newcastle, the match is also available to live stream on Saturday evening.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe illness latest after Jason Tindall Newcastle United update and Ipswich possibility
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe will continue to watch his side in action from hospital as he continues to recover from pneumonia. There has been no timeframe on Howe's return and Tindall has revealed how he has no update on how the Newcastle boss' current situation is.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United have Premier League second place advantage over Arsenal after major boost
arts.sum: Liverpool's 13 point safety-net at the top of the table seemingly leaves the title race all wrapped up, but with just four points separating Newcastle United and Arsenal the fight for the second place spot is only just beginning. With only six games left to play before this year's Premier League comes to a close, Newcastle's race for second place may have been handed a huge boost.

arts.ttl: Manager makes ‘next step’ admission over Newcastle United transfer target
arts.sum: Monaco manager Adi Hutter has hinted that winger Maghnes Akliouche is ready to take the ‘next step’ amid transfer links with Newcastle United ahead of the summer window. Those clubs interested have now been handed a potential boost in their pursuit with Hutter appearing to admit that the player may move on this summer.

arts.ttl: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia “wound” remains open – Aston Villa thought to hold answer
arts.sum: Napoli begrudgingly sold Khvicha Kvaratskhelia to Paris Saint-Germain in the last January window. After a deal fell through in the summer, the Ligue 1 champions finally secured their priority target. But for the Serie A club, a replacement is still needed.
